short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course
short_description_of_the_course.value:
To present students with an in-depth examination of the theoretical and practical issues involved in providing tools to access large collections of documents, especially in the context of the World Wide Web.
To present students with the practical engineering issues raised by the design and implementation of an information retrieval system.

requirements_of_entry.label: Requirements of Entry
value: For Honours students - third year Computing Science.For MSci students - fourth year Computing Science.Mandatory courses:  Two from Maths 1R, 1S, 1T, 1X, 1Y (or equivalent)

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions

course_aims.label: Course Aims
course_aims.value:
To present students with an in-depth examination of the theoretical and practical issues involved in providing tools to access large collections of documents, especially in the context of the World Wide Web.
To present students with the practical engineering issues raised by the design and implementation of an information retrieval system.

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

description_of_summative_assessment.label: Description of Summative Assessment
description_of_summative_assessment.value: Examination 70%, coursework 30%. (25% Assessment, 5% in class quizzes)

formative_assessment_feedback.label: Formative Assessment & Feedback
formative_assessment_feedback.value: Written feedback on assessed coursework; Verbal feedback during class discussions.
